title: tiniaria cristata
intro: Tiniaria cristata, also known as the Creeping Thyme, is a low-growing, spreading herbaceous perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems due to its carvacrol and thymol content. The health benefits of Tiniaria cristata include reducing inflammation, relieving stress and anxiety, and improving cognitive function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Tiniaria cristata can be prepared into teas, infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
